# Billion AI Operations Studio

Billion AI Operations Studio sells self-serve digital business kits and remote B2B professional services for AI operations diagnostics, RFP and proposal monitoring setup, and reception AI pilot planning.

Public business site:

- https://billionai.vercel.app/
- https://billionai.vercel.app/faq.html
- https://billionai.vercel.app/compare.html
- https://billionai.vercel.app/samples.html
- https://billionai.vercel.app/delivery-access.html
- https://billionai.vercel.app/templates/ai-ops-control-matrix.html
- https://billionai.vercel.app/templates/ai-ops-risk-checklist.html
- https://billionai.vercel.app/templates/rfp-keyword-tracker.html
- https://billionai.vercel.app/templates/rfp-source-map.html
- https://billionai.vercel.app/templates/reception-fallback-rules.html
- https://billionai.vercel.app/templates/reception-inquiry-map.html
- https://billionai.vercel.app/kits/ai-ops-diagnostic-kit.html
- https://billionai.vercel.app/kits/rfp-radar-setup-kit.html
- https://billionai.vercel.app/kits/reception-ai-pilot-kit.html
- https://billionai.vercel.app/kits/ai-operations-starter-bundle.html
- https://billionai.vercel.app/guides/ai-operations-risk-checklist.html
- https://billionai.vercel.app/guides/rfp-radar-workflow.html
- https://billionai.vercel.app/guides/reception-ai-pilot-plan.html
- https://billionai.vercel.app/use-cases/ai-ops-governance.html
- https://billionai.vercel.app/use-cases/rfp-monitoring-workflow.html
- https://billionai.vercel.app/use-cases/reception-ai-pilot.html
- https://billionai.vercel.app/legal/privacy.html

Important constraints:

- Hosted checkout links must be activated by the payment account owner before payments can be collected.
- The public pages include no forms, client-side scripts, tracking code, custom checkout code, or upload fields.
- Free guides are public planning content and do not include forms, tracking, or delivery-file links.
- FAQ, comparison, and sample pages are public buyer-qualification content and do not expose full delivery files.
- Template preview pages describe fields and buyer fit, but do not expose full delivery files.
- Use-case pages are product selection guides, not implementation advice or outcome guarantees.
- Services do not include regulated financial advice, legal representation, medical diagnosis, lending, gambling, employment decisions, or physical goods.
